raw_response:
{
  "recommended_liveplay_sequence": [
    "Select EGA graphics adapter (1)",
    "Start new game",
    "Proceed through initial tutorial/mission to create party",
    "Save game immediately after party creation",
    "Travel to first combat zone if possible",
    "Engage in first combat and save again",
    "Exit game cleanly"
  ],
  "expected_files_to_watch": [
    "SAVEGAME.SAV",
    "PARTY.DAT",
    "CHARACTERS.DAT",
    "MAP*.DAT",
    "COMBAT*.DAT",
    "GAMESTATE.DAT"
  ],
  "diff_strategy": [
    "Run baseline sha256 hash on all expected files",
    "Play through sequence above",
    "Run post-play sha256 hash on same files",
    "Compare hashes to identify changed files",
    "Diff changed binary files with hexdump or similar tool",
    "Look for patterns in changed data that correlate with party/combat actions"
  ],
  "likely_format_hypotheses": [
    {
      "hypothesis": "SAVEGAME.SAV contains a header followed by party/character data blocks",
      "confidence": "high"
    },
    {
      "hypothesis": "CHARACTERS.DAT is a packed array of character structures with fixed offsets for stats and attributes",
      "confidence": "medium"
    },
    {
      "hypothesis": "MAP*.DAT files contain grid-based map data with tile identifiers",
      "confidence": "high"
    },
    {
      "hypothesis": "COMBAT*.DAT contains battle state including turn order, HP, and action queues",
      "confidence": "medium"
    }
  ],
  "automation_risks": [
    "Keystroke automation may miss timing-sensitive UI elements",
    "DOSBox-X may not fully replicate original hardware behavior",
    "Game may crash or corrupt save files during automated play",
    "xte/xdotool may not handle all input types (e.g., joystick, mouse movement)"
  ],
  "validation_checks": [
    "Verify SHA256 hashes match baseline before starting play",
    "Confirm game loads and runs without errors in DOSBox-X",
    "Check that save files are created with expected names and sizes",
    "Validate that combat encounters occur as expected after reaching first zone",
    "Ensure diff tool output shows meaningful changes in binary data"
  ]
}
